headline: ONCOR TO RELEASE FIRST QUARTER 2026 RESULTS MAY 7
summary: DALLAS, April 20, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Oncor Electric Delivery Company LLC plans to release its first quarter 2026 results on May 7, prior to Sempra's first quarter 2026 results conference call....

headline: Sempra to Report First-Quarter 2026 Earnings on May 7
